chunks.text: December IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar December IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, December 9th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Lin

, December 9th, 2025. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, December 10th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable unti

r 10th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS s

ill be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and themis may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Thursday, December 11th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about

DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30am (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). Linux login servers login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will also be patched and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2025-12-16 | larsroh

ted around this time. UPDATE [2025-12-16 | larsrohr ] This work was completed by around noon on December 11th. Resolved as of 2025-12-11 12pm Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Servi
ents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
